message:
feat(tests): comprehensive self-healing unit tests (bd-59kg)

Add unit tests for self-healing system components:

Hook Installation Tests:
- test_install_hook_at_path_no_claude_dir_returns_not_applicable (CRITICAL)
- test_install_hook_at_path_claude_dir_exists_no_settings
- test_install_hook_at_path_already_installed
- test_install_hook_at_path_preserves_existing_hooks
- test_install_hook_at_path_malformed_json_recovers
- test_install_hook_at_path_dry_run_no_changes
- test_check_hook_at_path_not_exists/installed/needs_update

Config Tests:
- test_apply_env_overrides_self_healing_master_disable_precedence
- RCH_NO_SELF_HEALING master disable now takes precedence

Refactoring:
- Add check_claude_code_hook_at_path for testability
- Add install_claude_code_hook_at_path for testability
- Handle malformed JSON gracefully in check_claude_code_hook

The CRITICAL test verifies that when ~/.claude doesn't exist
(user doesn't use Claude Code), we return NotApplicable and
do NOT create the directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
